Jupt.

Mars in the 12th to Venus-Saturn conjunction indicates uterine troubles,
and abortions-(Venus caught between Mars and Saturn). She may have to
undergo operations. She will live up to 63 years of age.
CHART 483
Mercury in Scorpio all alone, has Rahu-Mars conjunction in 12th to his
place. So the educational career will be hampered. The nature will be of a
good character as Jupiter is conjunct Saturn. The Jupiter-Saturn combination
in the house of Mars gives landed property. With Venus and the Moon to
contact in the beginning of his rounds by Saturn, the landed property will
yield good returns. As Saturn contacts Mercury the native may change his

316 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
Jupt residence and profession and take up
Sat trade in some other place.
